scripts.check: npm run secrets:check && node --check scripts/ensure-native.mjs && node --check scripts/talkeby-cli.mjs && node --check src/server.mjs && node --check src/http/routes.mjs && node --check src/http/jobs-routes.mjs && node --check src/http/events-route.mjs && node --check src/http/shared.mjs && node --check src/http/security.mjs && node --check src/http/serializers.mjs && node --check src/runners/codex.mjs && node --check src/services/codex-native-continuity.mjs && node --check src/services/codex-sessions.mjs && node --check src/services/job-runner.mjs && node --check src/services/runtime-state.mjs

scripts.launchd:uninstall:all: npm run launchd:web:uninstall && npm run launchd:uninstall
